---
title: "2025-W12"
---

- [Astronauts accidentally dropped a tool bag on a spacewalk, and you can see it with binoculars](https://www.livescience.com/space/space-exploration/astronauts-accidentally-dropped-a-tool-bag-on-a-spacewalk-and-you-can-see-it-with-binoculars)
- [Is there no such thing as Italian cuisine?](https://www.bbc.com/travel/article/20250227-is-there-no-such-thing-as-italian-cuisine)
- [At a Deluxe Dining Room on the 100th Floor, a Chef Toils in Obscurity](https://www.nytimes.com/2025/01/22/nyregion/condo-tower-restaurants.html)
